scripts.deploy: astro build && wrangler pages deploy dist
scripts.db:migrate: wrangler d1 execute song-db --local --file=./migrations/0001_init.sql && wrangler d1 execute song-db --local --file=./migrations/0002_albums.sql && wrangler d1 execute song-db --local --file=./migrations/0003_practice_files.sql
scripts.db:migrate:remote: wrangler d1 execute song-db --remote --file=./migrations/0001_init.sql && wrangler d1 execute song-db --remote --file=./migrations/0002_albums.sql && wrangler d1 execute song-db --remote --file=./migrations/0003_practice_files.sql
